conversation_goal: Answer where we are, whether cash/spending is covered, what the biggest risks are, what to watch next, and what the advisor is planning to do.
core_user_question: What do I need to know without reading every analytic report?

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.why_included: Starts with portfolio scale and completeness.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: What cash did the portfolio deliver?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows recent cash generated and paid out before discussing projections.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.why_included: Separates stated cash need support from trailing cash delivery.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Can we trust the numbers enough to show them?
ordered_steps.why_included: Warns when data confidence changes interpretation.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: What does the portfolio own broadly?
ordered_steps.why_included: Keeps broad ownership legible without manager detail.

ordered_steps.caveat: Local synthetic product-review report; not production reporting.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: What are the biggest portfolio risks?
ordered_steps.why_included: Shows the few biggest current downside cases.

ordered_steps.caveat: No generated plan mockup exists yet; future UI/demo wiring should collect advisor plan language.
ordered_steps.visible_question_answered: Unavailable until its data and report shape are approved.
ordered_steps.why_included: Represents the next report needed to complete this conversation.

what_this_workflow_proves: Arangur can order accepted reports into a concise principal briefing and leave dense attribution out unless needed.
why_this_workflow_exists: Some principals want the smallest useful conversation, not the full analytic library.
